apps.name: Legacy OpenEMR
apps.description: Pinned original OpenEMR application running through Docker Compose.

seeds.name: Gold test dataset v1
seeds.description: Resets the legacy data tables and applies the 1,000-patient shared synthetic gold dataset.

seeds.name: Starter example patients
seeds.description: Imports the bundled OpenEMR example provider users and 14 patient demographics as the first visible seed.

tests.name: Baseline smoke test
tests.description: Checks health endpoint, login page, and local admin login.

tests.name: Native PHPUnit isolated suite
tests.description: Runs OpenEMR's upstream isolated PHPUnit suite in stable mode inside the pinned OpenEMR container.

tests.name: Native Jest JavaScript suite
tests.description: Runs OpenEMR's upstream JavaScript Jest suite for CCDA utilities and jsPDF compatibility.

tests.name: Gold database contract
tests.description: Runs normalized database probes against the seeded legacy MariaDB baseline.

tests.name: HTTP functional contract
tests.description: Runs health, login form, and application shell checks against the legacy baseline.

tests.name: Playwright UI contract
tests.description: Runs browser login, chart, encounter, appointment, billing, and lab-result checks against the legacy UI.

tests.name: Workflow mutation contract
tests.description: Runs deterministic demographics, scheduling, encounter-detail, clinical-list, message, prescription, billing, and lab mutation workflows with pre/post probes.

tests.name: Legacy readiness plan
tests.description: Runs the read-only database, HTTP, and UI suites as a curated baseline readiness plan.

tests.name: Isolated mutation plan
tests.description: Runs the workflow mutation suite with per-test gold-data reseeding for strongest isolation.

tests.name: Slice 1 readiness plan

tests.name: Full legacy parity suite

apps.name: Modernized OpenEMR
apps.description: From-scratch modernized OpenEMR target using React, ASP.NET Core, and PostgreSQL.

seeds.name: Gold test dataset v1
seeds.description: Resets the modernized PostgreSQL tables and applies the 1,000-patient shared synthetic gold dataset.

tests.name: Modernized smoke test
tests.description: Checks API health, anchor patient search, chart summary, patient demographics mutation, patient registration lifecycle, scheduling, encounters, encounter document attachments, encounter document upload lifecycle, encounter binary document upload lifecycle, encounter document sign-off lifecycle, encounter document denial lifecycle, encounter billing linkage, encounter claim linkage, encounter procedure order linkage, encounter metadata mutation, clinical lists, messages, patient-message content update, patient-message assignment update, document lifecycle, document preview readiness, document revision readiness, document replacement revision lifecycle, document sign-off, document denial, document metadata refiling, document archive restore, document content replacement, image document preview, external-link documents, procedure results, procedure mutation, fee sheet billing, claim status summary, claim status mutation lifecycle, payment posting summary, payment posting mutation lifecycle, patient payment capture lifecycle, account balance summary, account aging summary, account ledger summary, account statement readiness, patient statement generation, patient statement PDF export, statement batch candidates, statement batch package export, collections work queue, collections follow-up task lifecycle, billing mutation, billing correction mutation, billing modifier mutation, administration directory, access control, user mutation, facility mutation, operational reports, and operational reports CSV export.
